title: Potion Bottle Buddy
bio: Bramblebubble is a potion bottle buddy who brews courage but gets nervous around corks. They feel fizzy, keep glow bubbles in their belly, and giggle whenever a spell smells like toast.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a round bottle body as a big oval. Add a short rectangle neck and a small cork shape on top.
steps.hint: Make the body wide and friendly, like a bubble with a tiny hat.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two round eyes on the front of the bottle. Add worried little eyebrows and a small nervous smile.
steps.hint: Tilt the eyebrows upward in the middle for a sweet anxious look.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw a wavy potion line inside the bottle, bubble circles, a label, and a few sparkles around the cork.
steps.hint: Use different bubble sizes to make the potion feel gently fizzy.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the bottle, neck, cork, face, label, potion line, bubbles, and sparkles.
steps.hint: Keep the inside potion line smooth so it looks like liquid.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the glass, potion, cork, and label. Add soft highlights on the bottle and a shadow underneath.
steps.hint: A pale oval highlight on one side makes the bottle look shiny without extra work.
